Buttons do not have an accessible name (rule: button-name) DAP-756f8154

When a button doesn't have an accessible name, screen readers announce it as "button", making it unusable for users who rely on screen readers. Learn how to make buttons more accessible.

Disabilities affected: ~666People who are blind or have no functional vision. Estimated ~666 people potentially excluded (1.0% prevalence × 66,625 affected page loads) ~200People who are deaf and cannot hear audio content. Estimated ~200 people potentially excluded (0.3% prevalence × 66,625 affected page loads)

Affected elements (5):

Element 1 DAP-e7d02784

Element path: div.field__item > div.paragraph > div.ds-u-lg-display--none > button#trigger-tabs-785031515

Snippet:

<button type="button" id="trigger-tabs-785031515" aria-expanded="false" class="responsive-tabs__tab-button--mobile ds-u-display--flex" role="tab" aria-controls="tabs-785031515">

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Element does not have inner text that is visible to screen readers
  • aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  • aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  • Element has no title attribute
  • Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  • Element does not have an explicit <label>
  • Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"

Lighthouse Accessibility Score: 97

Axe findings: 1

Touch targets do not have sufficient size or spacing. (rule: target-size) DAP-5b76b181

Touch targets with sufficient size and spacing help users who may have difficulty targeting small controls to activate the targets. Learn more about touch targets.

Disabilities affected: ~1KPeople with limited hand, finger, or fine motor dexterity. Estimated ~1,529 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 66,461 affected page loads) ~3KPeople with limited reach, strength, or stamina. Estimated ~3,855 people potentially excluded (5.8% prevalence × 66,461 affected page loads)

Affected elements (33):

Element 1 DAP-44334a9e

Element path: div.esri-ui > div.esri-ui-inner-container > div.esri-ui-top-left > div.esri-component

Snippet:

<div class="esri-component esri-home esri-widget--button esri-widget esri-disabled" role="button" tabindex="0" aria-label="Home">

Label: Home

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Target has insufficient size (20px by 20px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  • Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 20px instead of at least 24px.

https://home.treasury.gov

Lighthouse Accessibility Score: 93

Axe findings: 3

Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio. (rule: color-contrast) DAP-7c30692a

Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast.

Disabilities affected: ~1KPeople with low vision who need magnification or high contrast. Estimated ~1,522 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 66,183 affected page loads) ~2KPeople who cannot distinguish certain colors (color blindness). Estimated ~2,846 people potentially excluded (4.3% prevalence × 66,183 affected page loads)

Element 1 DAP-8f731101

<button type="button" class="treasury-x-feed-feed__filter" data-feed-filter="secretary" aria-pressed="false">

Label: Secretary Bessent

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 20.6px instead of at least 24px.

Element path: div.site-menu > ul > li > a

Snippet:

<a href="/careers" data-display-mobile="0" data-display-desktop="0" data-drupal-link-system-path="node/984846">

  • Target has insufficient size (43.6px by 18px, should be at least 24px by 24px)
  • Target has insufficient space to its closest neighbors. Safe clickable space has a diameter of 20.6px instead of at least 24px.

`[aria-hidden="true"]` elements contain focusable descendents (rule: aria-hidden-focus) DAP-36bf93e1

Focusable descendents within an `[aria-hidden="true"]` element prevent those interactive elements from being available to users of assistive technologies like screen readers. Learn how `aria-hidden` affects focusable elements.

Heading elements are not in a sequentially-descending order (rule: heading-order) DAP-307136cb

Properly ordered headings that do not skip levels convey the semantic structure of the page, making it easier to navigate and understand when using assistive technologies. Learn more about heading order.

Some elements have a `[tabindex]` value greater than 0 (rule: tabindex) DAP-0256ac01

A value greater than 0 implies an explicit navigation ordering. Although technically valid, this often creates frustrating experiences for users who rely on assistive technologies. Learn more about the `tabindex` attribute.

`[aria-*]` attributes do not match their roles (rule: aria-allowed-attr) DAP-2219f962

https://www.nist.gov

Lighthouse Accessibility Score: 95

Axe findings: 2

Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio. (rule: color-contrast) DAP-a2e460d3

Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast.

Disabilities affected: ~1KPeople with low vision who need magnification or high contrast. Estimated ~1,361 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 59,174 affected page loads) ~2KPeople who cannot distinguish certain colors (color blindness). Estimated ~2,544 people potentially excluded (4.3% prevalence × 59,174 affected page loads)

Affected elements (1):

Element 1 DAP-c39b25a8

Element path: div.bg-base-lightest > div.grid-container > div.nist-page-segment > a.usa-button

Snippet:

<a href="/news-events/news" class="usa-button usa-button--outline usa-button--big usa-button--accent-cool nis…">

Label: See NIST News

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.06 (foreground color: #008817, background color: #f0f0f0, font size: 14.4pt (19.2px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
Document does not have a main landmark. (rule: landmark-one-main) DAP-5aa4e139

One main landmark helps screen reader users navigate a web page. Learn more about landmarks.

Disabilities affected: ~592People who are blind or have no functional vision. Estimated ~592 people potentially excluded (1.0% prevalence × 59,174 affected page loads) ~178People who are deaf and cannot hear audio content. Estimated ~178 people potentially excluded (0.3% prevalence × 59,174 affected page loads) ~1KPeople with limited hand, finger, or fine motor dexterity. Estimated ~1,361 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 59,174 affected page loads)

Affected elements (1):

Element 1 DAP-cc85a23e

Element path: html.js

Snippet:

<html lang="en" dir="ltr" prefix="content: http://purl.org/rss/1.0/modules/content/  dc: http://purl.org/dc/…" class="js" data-once="drupal-dialog-deprecation-listener webform-dialog">

How to fix: Fix all of the following:

  • Document does not have a main landmark

Accessibility Findings

https://faa.gov

Lighthouse Accessibility Score: 93

Axe findings: 2

Background and foreground colors do not have a sufficient contrast ratio. (rule: color-contrast) DAP-ca5cf58d

Low-contrast text is difficult or impossible for many users to read. Learn how to provide sufficient color contrast.

Disabilities affected: ~1KPeople with low vision who need magnification or high contrast. Estimated ~1,340 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 58,282 affected page loads) ~2KPeople who cannot distinguish certain colors (color blindness). Estimated ~2,506 people potentially excluded (4.3% prevalence × 58,282 affected page loads)

Affected elements (2):

Element 1 DAP-391cafef

Element path: form > div.row > div.home__form > input.btn

Snippet:

<input type="submit" value="Submit" class="btn btn-gold my-0">

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.33 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #b0862c, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1

Element 2 DAP-429d80f1

Element path: div.quick_search-delays > form#faa-airport-status-lookup-form > div.col-4 > input#airport-code-status-search-submit

Snippet:

<input data-drupal-selector="airport-code-status-search-submit" type="submit" id="airport-code-status-search-submit" name="op" value="Submit" class="js-form-submit form-submit btn btn-gold my-0 h-100 w-100 form-control" data-once="drupal-ajax">

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.33 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #b0862c, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
Some elements have a `[tabindex]` value greater than 0 (rule: tabindex) DAP-b6e82c3e

A value greater than 0 implies an explicit navigation ordering. Although technically valid, this often creates frustrating experiences for users who rely on assistive technologies. Learn more about the `tabindex` attribute.

Disabilities affected: ~583People who are blind or have no functional vision. Estimated ~583 people potentially excluded (1.0% prevalence × 58,282 affected page loads) ~175People who are deaf and cannot hear audio content. Estimated ~175 people potentially excluded (0.3% prevalence × 58,282 affected page loads) ~1KPeople with limited hand, finger, or fine motor dexterity. Estimated ~1,340 people potentially excluded (2.3% prevalence × 58,282 affected page loads)

Affected elements (1):

Element 1 DAP-c4c4e089

Element path: form > div.row > div.col-12 > span.tool

Snippet:

<span class="tool" tabindex="1">

How to fix: Fix any of the following:

  • Element has a tabindex greater than 0
